title: Health / Mind / Business / Love quadrant — March 2024 life-domains scaffold
html:
Health / Mind / Business / Love quadrant — March 2024 life-domains scaffold

Source: 2024-03-17 Apple Note. Four life-domain headers (Health, Mind, Business, Love) with sub-bullets, written ~7 weeks before the May 2024 Asia trip departure. A scaffolding note for what he wanted to be optimizing pre-China.

TL;DR

  • Four-domain frame: Health (Training, Diet, Cardio/Movement, Sleep/Recovery), Mind (Passions, Interests/Curiosities, Requirements), Business (empty), Love (empty).
  • Health is the only domain populated — fits the anabolic scoring / leg day training spike of Feb–Mar 2024.
  • Business + Love left blank — telling. The pre-China Yahir hadn't yet committed to a venture (Bromenu/Brotein hadn't crystallized) and the Sam thread was still active but unresolved (would break in April).
  • "Mind: Requirements" — unusual phrasing. Suggests he was trying to define what he needed to know (not what he wanted), an early version of the asking the right question discipline.
  • The empty quadrants are the data: this note captures what he could not yet articulate in spring 2024.

Pattern

This is a dashboard skeleton he never filled in. The four-domain frame (Health/Mind/Business/Love) becomes the implicit organizing structure of later year end todos and the 2025 monthly journals.

Open questions

  • Did Business stay empty until Rankett kicked off?
  • Was "Love" left blank because the Sam arc was already terminal in his head?

Related

  • 2024 02 29 workout split
  • shanghai study abroad
  • anabolic scoring
  • asking the right question
